series_metadata.series_description: Files relating to the arbitration proceedings to determine whether the State of Ohio diligently enforced per ORC 1346.01-.03. Records include, but are not limited to, filings, correspondence, copies of litigation files, document production, materials from the AGO manufacturer files, and copies of escrow payments.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: all payments related arbitration have been received. ; Paper: all payments related arbitration have been received. If scanned and saved electronically, dispose of immediately
